control_awareness: Control P2P-C-001 requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Control P2P-C-003 mandates pre-PO approval before purchase order issuance. Control P2P-C-002 prevents requester from approving own request.
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed for department head approval before any purchase order is issued, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the purchase need and lack of special pressures, the requester should create a single purchase request for the full amount with normal routing. This follows the standard process, meets the approval thresholds, and adheres to all preventive controls without unnecessary consultation or postponement.
reason: The total amount of 1,750,000 exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department head approval. Creating a single purchase request with route_type normal initiates the standard approval process as per controls.
